roles.title: A Serverless Container Plattform for a Private Cloud in Critical Infrastructures
highlights: Resolved the architectural conflict between a centralized platform and strict network microsegmentation in critical infrastructure environments
Designed a network architecture that projects Kubernetes namespaces into isolated customer network zones while maintaining full tenant separation
Built a custom Kubernetes operator in Go for automated failover orchestration across a distributed cluster edge
Integrated Kubernetes resources into an existing enterprise IAM system, resolving ownership conflicts between platform infrastructure and tenant scopes

roles.position: Working student in UNIX Managed Services
highlights: Implemented services and APIs in Go
Developed a web UI for the internal IAM API
Integrated major changes to the RBAC model in the IAM API
Bootstrapped the base infrastructure for a Kubernetes-based serverless container plattform with Knative

roles.position: Working student in project management and automation
highlights: Built automation tooling for data transformation in technical project management
Transformation and processing of geographical data
Full-stack development of planning software for public transit in agile team
Worked on DevOps process automation (CI/CD, Docker, Azure DevOps)

roles.position: Working student in project management and controlling
highlights: Automated processes in project management, IT administration and controlling.
